idea.problem: Financial institutions struggle to validate new employees' identities and work history
idea.target_user: Recruiting Manager at a US or EU bank with 50+ employees
idea.solution: Automated employee verification service that verifies employment and identity using publicly available data sources
idea.why_now: With remote work on the rise, verifying employee identity and work history is becoming increasingly challenging and time-consuming
idea.existing_spend_behavior: Many financial institutions already spend money on professional background checks and employee verification services

signal.source_text: ThreatMark | Security, Machine Learning | REMOTE(World) / Brno, Czech Republic | Equity ThreatMark protects >50M end users from finacial fraud and saves > $100M every year in losses. We are working with top banks in EU and US to protect their end users. We develop large-behavioral models that recognizes returning users by their mouse movements, keystroke timings and sensoric data (accelerometer, gyroscope). We detect cyberthreats (e.g. malware, phishing, scraping) by exploiting browsers/sandboxes of devices. We manage ~PB scale of data and provide realtime scoring in milliseconds driving authentication/authorization flow (2nd factor). Stack: [python, typescript, rust], [redis, postgresql], [aws, terraform] ... We are looking for exceptional engineers to build with us and be part of the success: - Backend Engineer [rust, python] - low-latency stream processing engine, rewrite python microservices to rust - DevOps Engineer (IaaC in AWS) If you are interested, please email us @ career@threatmark.com with subject "HN Who's Hiring" If you don't find the right role here or at  https://www.threatmark.com/careers/ , write us anyway if you believe you can be good fit :) Krystof Hilar, Co-Founder & CTO

title: Automated Employee VerificationAI
tagline: Automated employee verification service that verifies employment and identity using publicly available data sources
validation_steps: Post in 3 niche communities where Recruiting Manager at a US or EU bank with 50+ employees hangs out
DM 20 potential users with a personalised problem framing
Offer a free 7-day trial in exchange for a 15-min onboarding call
Charge on day 8 using Stripe Payment Link
template:
# Google Form + Manual Fulfillment MVP

## Step 1 — Create Google Form
Fields:
  1. Name (short answer)
  2. Email (short answer)
  3. Describe your current problem in detail (paragraph)
  4. How much would you pay per month for a solution? (multiple choice: $29 / $49 / $99 / Other)

## Step 2 — Connect to Google Sheets
- Link the form to a Google Sheet for automatic response collection.

## Step 3 — Outreach template (cold DM / email)
Subject: Quick question about Financial institutions struggle to validate new em

Hi [Name],

I'm building Automated Employee VerificationAI — Automated employee verification service that verifies employment and identity using publicly available data sources

I'd love to send you a free trial in exchange for 10 minutes of feedback.
Interested? Fill this 1-min form: [FORM_LINK]

## Step 4 — Manual fulfillment checklist
- [ ] Receive form submission
- [ ] Deliver result within 24h via email
- [ ] Follow up after 3 days
- [ ] Ask for payment if they found value: $49/mo/mo

idea.problem: Businesses have limited visibility into the security and trustworthiness of their third-party vendors and partners
idea.target_user: Risk Manager at a company with 500+ employees and 100+ vendors
idea.solution: Third-party vendor risk assessment and management platform that provides AI-powered risk scores and recommendations
idea.why_now: The increase in remote work and outsourcing has made third-party vendor risk management a growing concern for businesses
idea.existing_spend_behavior: Many companies already spend money on annual security audits and risk assessments for their vendors

idea.problem: Companies struggle to recruit and retain top decentralized technology talent
idea.target_user: Senior hiring manager at a startup or scale-up interested in decentralized technologies
idea.solution: A decentralized job board and talent pipeline platform to streamline recruitment and talent attraction
idea.why_now: The rising demand for decentralized tech talent and the current limitations of traditional job boards make now the right moment to build it
idea.existing_spend_behavior: Existing job boards and recruitment agencies, talent acquisition platforms and career sites
